Issue 03 Fri 19 Jun 2026

In This Issue
01 Marketing 02 Projects

Five ways your company just made it easier for you to win H2

Half the year is behind us. This week’s issue stacks the plays — the Chairman flying in for our leaders on 10 July, the new refinance rule every cash-out buyer hasn’t heard yet, the Training Calendar that pitches your next recruit, up to 11.2% commission paid in 14 working days, and a team challenge with Koh Phangan on the line. Two departments, five plays, one read.

A Note to Agents

Five minutes here. Pick what helps. Run it this week.

01
Department

Marketing

— Highlight 01

Leaders, come see why you were always good enough — 10 July at GEO Resort Genting

The Mid Year Leader Conference is on Fri 10 July at GEO Resort Genting, and PropNex Malaysia is footing most of the bill. Here’s what your TL walks back in with:

  • Ismail Gafoor × Marcus Teng on one stage — Chairman (PropNex SG) × CEO (PropNex MY); Ismail flies in just for our leaders
  • A mid-year reset — recharge leadership, refocus vision, accelerate team momentum
  • RM300 subsidised + lunch buffet — your TL pays less, gets more
  • Fri 10 July 2026 · 9 AM – 6 PM at GEO Resort Genting
  • Team Leader & above only — if you’re not one, forward this to your TL today
Register Now
— Highlight 02

The Training Calendar plans your year AND pitches your next recruit

Here’s how to use every feature on the Training Page — a 6-step walkthrough.

1
🔍 Filter the calendar Pick date, branch, and event category at the top to surface what’s yours.
↓
2
🎟️ Click a course to see details and register Tap any course for date, venue, 4 ticket types, and Register Now — all on one screen.
↓
3
⭐ Check “Recommended For You” Scroll to the bottom of the page. The system surfaces this week’s must-attends when you’re unsure where to start.
↓
4
🗺️ Open the Agent Success Roadmap View-only career map — see which courses live at each tier (Emerging Producer → Rising Millionaire → Millionaire) and plan backwards.
↓
5
📌 Bookmark the 3 Signature Masterclasses PWS, AST, and SPM — the company’s flagship masterclasses. Click each for full details.
↓
6
⏰ Skim “Join Our Training Sessions” weekly Upcoming courses in date order. Lock your seat before the session fills.

🤝 Recruiting? Steps 4, 5, and 6 are also your sharpest pitch. Walk a prospect through the Roadmap, share a Masterclass detail page, or send the “Join Our Training Sessions” URL when they ask “what does PropNex actually run?” Transparency beats a brochure every time.

View Training Page
— Highlight 03

PropTalk Ep 3 gets you ahead of the new RM200K cash-out cap

PropTalk Episode 3 breaks down the new refinance rules — and what the RM200K cash-out cap actually means for your pipeline.

  • Understand the new refinance cap before your buyer does
  • Pre-qualify a refinance buyer in one question, not three viewings
  • Re-pitch upgraders with numbers that actually work post-cap
  • Filter speculative inquiries from real cash-out movers before they eat your week
  • Forward to any investor still pricing the next move at the old rules
Watch PropTalk Ep 3

Department

— Highlight 02

PropNex Worldcup Challenge — Let’s Bring the Cup Home

Your second half just got a scoreboard. The winning team flies to Koh Phangan.

From 1 July to 31 December 2026, three squads chase one cup. Register, close project sales, hit RM100K SPA signed across any combined projects to qualify.

Teams (min 20 pax each · each project must hit RM5M net GDV sales):

  • Team 1 — KL Projects (5 projects)
  • Team 2 — Investment Projects (5 projects)
  • Other Team — Any Projects (5 projects)

Winner Incentive: Full Moon Party 🌕 Koh Phangan · March / April · winning team only.

One team. One goal. One champion.
